anthology_title: Unbroken Ground: Voices from the Second Start
chapter_premise: How losing the family auto-repair shop forced Marcus to separate his identity from the building, and what he rebuilt once there was nothing left to protect.
personal_stories: the padlock the bank sent by certified mail
target_reader: Working people who tied their whole identity to a business, a title, or a place and are afraid of who they'd be without it.
